category_sources: source_facts.description says it organizes software under one directory tree; GNU page describes Stow as a symlink farm manager.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page uses GNU Stow as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GNU Stow page links online documentation; official manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/stow/manual.
repo_sources: Official GNU Stow page states there is a git repository containing latest development code; GNU Savannah hosts the project git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page describe symlink farm management for organized software trees and configuration files.
